evidence.API_evidence: No API documentation found. This is an IoT hardware platform focused on industrial motherboards, embedded computers, and edge AI systems. No developer-facing APIs documented.
evidence.SDK_evidence: No SDKs found. Platform provides hardware products and cloud console (AICC) but no software development kits for third-party developers.
evidence.AI_evidence: Platform offers AI-powered solutions and edge AI systems but no AI models, agents, or development tools accessible to third-party developers.
evidence.language_evidence: English language throughout portal. LinkedIn and YouTube links found in external links section and footer.

coding_notes: ASUS IoT is a hardware-focused platform providing industrial computing solutions. DEVP=1 due to comprehensive developer portal website structure. GIT=1 with GitHub repository containing Android kernel and device tree code. DATA=1 due to comprehensive Privacy Policy. OPEN=1 as platform provides free access to resources and information. No APIs, SDKs, or developer tools found - this is primarily a hardware vendor portal.

changes.GIT_prog_lang_list: "C; C++; Java; Shell; Makefile" → "Bash/Shell; C; C++; Java"
